slides.title: System name and review purpose
slides.subtitle: Decision, risk, or design question for the room.

visual_aid.purpose: Set the review question before implementation detail.

speaker_notes.key_message: The room should know the decision or risk being reviewed.

slides.title: Runtime flow
body: Show only the components needed for the decision.
slides.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  A[Client] --> B[API]
  B --> C[Worker]
  C --> D[Store]

visual_aid.purpose: Ground the review in the smallest useful system map.

validation.expected: The architecture map renders with legible node labels.
validation.fallback: Replace the diagram with a static component list.

speaker_notes.key_message: The diagram exists to support the decision, not to show every component.
talk_track: Pause at the boundary that matters.

slides.title: Code path that proves the behavior

code.caption: Paste the smallest source-backed snippet that matters.

visual_aid.purpose: Show the concrete source path behind the claim.

validation.expected: The code remains short enough to read from a projected slide.
validation.fallback: Move the full snippet to backup and keep only the key line.

speaker_notes.key_message: The code snippet should prove one behavior only.
talk_track: Name the file path before explaining the line.
Explain only the behavior under review.
Do not turn the slide into a code walkthrough.

visual_aid.purpose: Make operational risk easy to compare.

validation.expected: Risk, signal, and guardrail columns stay aligned and readable.
validation.fallback: Promote the highest-risk item to its own slide.

speaker_notes.key_message: The review should end with concrete guardrails, not vague concern.
talk_track: Separate the risk from the signal.
Only include guardrails that can be owned.
Ask whether any risk is missing.

visual_aid.purpose: Put the decision tradeoff in one scannable frame.

validation.expected: The current and proposed paths use parallel criteria.
validation.fallback: Use a table if the tradeoff has more than three criteria.

motion.purpose: Mark the move from risk review to decision.
motion.reduced_motion_fallback: The title communicates the decision step without motion.

speaker_notes.key_message: The audience should leave able to choose or reject the proposal.
talk_track: Explain the cost of staying current.
Ask for the next owner or follow-up artifact.
